DP.338.0000:
Hello there!
It’s so very nice to meet you!\f
Welcome to the world of Pokémon!\f
DP.338.0001:
My name is Rowan.\f
However, everyone just calls me
the Pokémon Professor.\f
Before I go any further, is this
your first adventure?\f
If you need advice, I’m certainly
capable of giving it.\f
DP.338.0002:
Moves the main character.
Also used to choose various
headings and selections.

Used to confirm a choice, check
things, chat, and scroll text.

Used to exit, cancel a choice,
and cancel a mode.
DP.338.0003:
Press to open the menu.

Press to use an item, such
as a Bicycle, that has been
registered in advance.
DP.338.0004:
The lower screen is called
the Touch Screen.

The Touch Screen will display
a variety of touch buttons
depending on the situation.
DP.338.0005:
If this mark is shown in the
message window, there are active
buttons you can touch on the
Touch Screen below.
DP.338.0007:
Do you understand everything
so far?[0200,0000]
DP.338.0008:
Please touch a button on the
Touch Screen below.[0200,0000]
DP.338.0009:
Would you like to know more about
anything else?\f
DP.338.0010:
You are about to enter a world
where you will embark on a grand
adventure of your very own.
DP.338.0011:
Speak to people and check things
wherever you go, be it in towns,
roads, or caves.
Gather information and hints from
every possible source.
DP.338.0012:
New paths will open to you when
you help people in need, overcome
challenges, and solve mysteries.
DP.338.0013:
At times, you will be challenged
by others to a battle.
At other times, wild creatures
may stand in your way.

By overcoming such hurdles,
you will gain great power.
DP.338.0014:
However, your adventure is not
solely about becoming powerful.
DP.338.0015:
On your travels, we hope that
you will meet countless people
and, through them, achieve
personal growth.

This is the most important
objective of this adventure.
DP.338.0016:
This world is widely inhabited by
creatures known as Pokémon.\f
DP.338.0017:
Here, I have a Poké Ball.\f
Touch the button on the middle of
the Poké Ball, if you’d please.[0200,0000]
DP.338.0018:
No, no! Not that button!
The button on the Poké Ball.[0200,0000]
DP.338.0019:
We humans live alongside Pokémon
as friends.\f
At times we play together,
and at other times we\r
work together.\f
Some people use their Pokémon
to battle and develop\r
closer bonds with them.\f
What do I do?\f
I conduct research so that we may
learn more about Pokémon.\f
DP.338.0020:
Now, why don’t you tell me
a little bit about yourself?\f
DP.338.0021:
Are you a boy?
Or are you a girl?\f
DP.338.0022: All right, so you’re a boy?\f
DP.338.0023: All right, so you’re a girl?\f
DP.338.0024: Tell me, what is your name?\f
DP.338.0027:
OK...
So, you’re [0103,0000]?\f
A fine name that is!\f
Now, this boy here...
I believe he’s your friend.\f
DP.338.0029:
[0103,0001], is it?
That’s your friend’s name?\f
DP.338.0030:
All right, [0103,0000], the time
has come.\f
Your very own tale of grand
adventure is about to unfold.\f
On your journey, you will meet
countless Pokémon and people.\f
I’m sure that along the way you will
discover many things, perhaps even\r
something about yourself.\f
Now, go on, leap into the world of
Pokémon!\f
